delete-prompt-images.description: Remove prompt image artifacts from the repository and delete the directory.
delete-prompt-images.prompt: Delete all tracked and untracked files under ./prompt-images/ then remove the ./prompt-images directory itself. If the directory is already absent, confirm this with git status and return a no-op result. Keep the change limited to this cleanup, validate with git status that no prompt-images artifacts remain, and only finish when the repository is clean of this directory and the required checks are green.
